10.description:
[b]Camp Points[/b]
At the 13-minute mark of the battle, camps storing a large amount of herbs will appear. Deploy troops to gather them and you earn a small amount of points over time.

4.description:
Alchemy Workshop
There are 2 Alchemy Workshops, located near the entrance areas of 2 alliances. Capturing them grants substantial points continuously, and they should be prioritized at the start of the battle.

3.description:
Elixir Castle
The most crucial structure on the battlefield, located at the center of the area. The castle gates open 10 minutes into the battle, granting substantial points upon capture.

6.description:
Strategic Base I
There are numerous strategic facilities on the battlefield. Capturing them provides [c][d15858]a small amount of[-][/c] points over time and various benefits.

[Migration Portal] City relocation cooldown reduced by 50%.
[Observatory] Allied point efficiency increased by 10%.

5.description:
Healing Tent
There are 4 pre-built Healing Tents on the battlefield. Capturing them not only grants a moderate amount of points but also heals wounded soldiers.

[Healing Tent] heals 15 Wounded Soldiers every 10s.

2.description:
Entry Area
Two alliances will enter from the east and west sides of the battlefield, competing for points to achieve ultimate victory.

1.description:
Elixir Scramble
As the plague spreads across the world, the most scarce resource is always the cure for diseases. According to ancient texts, mysterious herbs grow in a land that only opens on the night of the Blood Moon.
It is said that a large quantity of elixirs is hidden within the legendary Elixir Castle, and these elixirs can effectively treat various diseases, attracting many to compete for them...

8.description:
[b]Occupation Points[/b]
Upon occupation, points will be generated continuously.
Occupied buildings will store points that can be plundered after a period of time.

7.description:
Strategic Base II
After 10 minutes of battle, all remaining strategic bases will be accessible. Capturing them grants a small amount of points over time and combat buffs.

[War Relic] Increases allied Heroes' ATK, DEF, and HP by 15%.
[Cursed Altar] Reduces enemy Heroes' ATK, DEF, and HP by 15%.

9.description:
[b]Breach Points[/b]
When a building is breached, Medkits will scatter around the area, and both sides can dispatch squads to collect them, earning a small amount of points.

71.description: R4 or R5 can declare war on adjacent cities, allowing alliance members to siege.

61.description: R4 or R5 can declare war on adjacent cities, allowing alliance members to siege.

94.description:
Royal City Scramble Rules:
1, The Royal City Scramble opens once a week, and only alliances occupying Lv.6 cities are eligible to participate.
2, The Royal City Scramble lasts for 8 hours. The first alliance to occupy for 4 hours, or the one with the longest total occupation time by the end, will be the ultimate victor.
3, The leader of the victorious alliance becomes the King.
4, The Royal City is surrounded by the Cursed Land, and territories relocated there cannot activate shields, while the Falcon Tower ceases operation, halting exploration quests.

93.description: At the end of the Event, claim generous rewards based on earned Honor Points!

83.description: Each quest point can be stolen up to 3 times. Share the quest point with alliance members for the joy.

91.description: During the Royal City battle, Alliance members can attack the city alone or in teams.

84.description: In the world thumbnail, view completed quest points, with different colors for quest bubbles of varying quality.

56.description: Raising stars boosts abilities, improving the quality and quantity of chests obtained from quests.

72.description: During a siege, defeat the city's garrison first. The garrison is strong, so proceed with caution.

54.description: Engage in battles with Doctors from different alliances in the world, such as plundering territories or attacking resource points. Battles may deplete your soldiers, so proceed with caution!

92.description: Conquer and maintain control of the Royal City to achieve ultimate victory in the Royal City Scramble!

82.description: Completed quest points will show a chest bubble. Tap the bubble to steal generous rewards. Note: Each quest can be stolen once per person per day.

81.description: When the countdown for the Covert Operation is less than 10m, it will be visible to everyone. To avoid losses, collect quest rewards promptly!

62.description: Attack cities, defeat garrisons, and deplete durability to earn participation rewards.

52.description: Completing various quests in the Falcon Tower grants generous rewards.

74.description: Once City DEF is depleted, total points from defeating the garrison and reducing durability will be tallied. The alliance with the highest points takes control of the city.

73.description: After defeating the garrison, deplete the city's durability. The more participants, the faster the process.

63.description: After the event, ranking rewards are settled based on the level and number of occupied cities.

55.description: Upon acquisition, you receive an extra reward each time you complete a Falcon Quest, with a chance to obtain UR items from the reward chest.

53.description: Dispatch troops to occupy Resource Spots for resource gathering. The higher the level of the Resource Spots, the more resources collected.

51.description: Defeating Blights in the world grants resources and items. Powerful Elite Blights require an alliance to launch an attack. The higher the Blight's level, the greater the rewards for defeating it.

20.des:
Medical Records:
The Blight has spread across this land, and individual strength seems insignificant in the face of such a crisis. It's very urgent for us to collaborate with doctors from other towns to uncover the mastermind and save lives.

10.des:
Medical Records:
Lucius and Marlena brought many severely injured soldiers; however, when they were treated alongside the town's existing patients, cross-infection occurred, worsening the conditions. We had to implement isolation measures to treat individuals with different conditions separately.

11.des:
Medical Records:
We restored the abandoned infirmary in the dense forest for treating wounded soldiers.

12.des:
Medical Records:
Clues from survivors reveal that the world beyond the town is nearly consumed by the Blight, and our concern extends beyond just the safety of this town.

16.des:
Medical Records:
To remain vigilant against surrounding threats, we constructed a Watchtower. Now, by defending against invaders, we might minimize the number of patients.

15.des:
Medical Records:
Through continuous effort and research, we have finally resolved most of the issues caused by the black rats, and the number of patients is no longer rapidly increasing.

14.des:
Medical Records:
We have a Research Lab and researchers, but we still need time to achieve significant progress.

13.des:
Medical Records:
Current research technology is insufficient to support the town's development; we require a dedicated Research Lab for research work.

4.des:
Medical Record
While focusing on developing the No.3 Antidote, we neglected our defenses. Some rats and Blights took advantage and caused damage to the town. Although we stabilized Celia's condition, some patients were severely bitten again and left us forever.

3.des:
Medical Record:
After extensive research, we've concluded that serum can only be extracted from specific Black Rats to create antidotes. Celia's condition has worsened significantly, and if she can't use the antidote promptly, the consequences could be dire.

6.des:
Medical Record
We encountered an eccentric wizard trapped by the Black Wizard's snare, searching for a way out of the dense forest. According to him, the Giant Rat King frequently roams the forest depths, and we must hasten our pace.

5.des:
Medical Record
We found survivors in the abandoned Weaving Workshop. After curing their ailments, they volunteered to work in the restored [c][5b9000]Weaving Workshop[-][/c], [c][5b9000]producing cloth[-][/c] for crafting basic Gear.

2.des:
Medical Record:
We discovered that the crucial explorer's camp in the dense forest has been overrun by Black Rats and Blights. Additionally, some survivors lost in the forest need our assistance.

21.des:
Medical Records:
The Blight has spread across this land, and individual strength seems insignificant in the face of such a crisis. It's very urgent for us to collaborate with doctors from other towns to uncover the mastermind and save lives.

19.des:
Medical Records:
The Blight has spread across this land, and individual strength seems insignificant in the face of such a crisis. It's very urgent for us to collaborate with doctors from other towns to uncover the mastermind and save lives.

18.des:
Medical Records:
The Blight has spread across this land, and individual strength seems insignificant in the face of such a crisis. It's very urgent for us to collaborate with doctors from other towns to uncover the mastermind and save lives.

8.des:
Medical Record
With the falconer's assistance, we constructed the Falcon Tower to gather information about the surrounding areas. Meanwhile, to strengthen our defenses, we built the Training Grounds to enhance our troop's strength.

7.des:
Medical Record:
We were at a disadvantage against the Giant Rat King, but in a critical moment, Royal City Knight Lucius and his soldiers came to our aid, allowing us to overcome the crisis and develop the final antidote. Celia has fully recovered, and we are finally relieved.

17.des:
Medical Records:
The Blight has spread across this land, and individual strength seems insignificant in the face of such a crisis. It's very urgent for us to collaborate with doctors from other towns to uncover the mastermind and save lives.

9.des:
Medical Records:
After venturing deep into the forest, the number of survivors discovered dwindles... This place seems less like the human world and more like a terrifying inferno.

10021.rescueTalk: What a disaster, I'm really not the culprit.

10300.rescueTalk: This place is terrifying! I need to get out of here.

10317.rescueTalk: Did you receive my distress signal?

10096.rescueTalk: Don't turn on the light yet. They'll notice us!

10308.rescueTalk: Can we still make it out alive?

10188.rescueTalk: Didn't expect anyone to make it here.

10273.rescueTalk: My research is about to succeed!

10192.rescueTalk: Maybe I can join the fight too.

10337.rescueTalk: I took these, and no one should notice.

10099.rescueTalk: Are you sure you don't want to come in and hide?

10252.rescueTalk: In my youth, I could take on ten at once.

10022.rescueTalk: Damn it, they've ravaged this land.

10297.rescueTalk: They turned this place into a living hell.

10253.rescueTalk: They must be eradicated, but I can't do it.

10296.rescueTalk: Hallucinations, I must be seeing things.

10216.rescueTalk: You seem injured. Let me heal you.

10058.rescueTalk: Watch out, Monsters can appear from any direction.

10060.rescueTalk: This is terrifying! Get me out of this hell!

10224.rescueTalk: Can I have a clean pair of pants?

10063.rescueTalk: Slow down, my legs are still shaking.

10277.rescueTalk: Please get me out of here! I beg you!

10321.rescueTalk: Be careful, I can sense them approaching.

10220.rescueTalk: I'm a doctor. Please let me join you.

10116.rescueTalk: I'm taking all of these with me.

10136.rescueTalk: Watch out! There are many Monsters.

10094.rescueTalk: Can you help me fix the circuits here?

10223.rescueTalk: I know some basic first aid.

10028.rescueTalk: Help! Get me out of this place!

10301.rescueTalk: Can we still make it out alive?

10032.rescueTalk: Help! Get me out of this place!

2.content: I am the harbinger of destruction!

10000.name: Top Healer
10000.desc: Earn points in the intense Doctor competition - the goal is to claim the honor of the Top Doctor and rewards.

26000.name: Battle Bard
26000.desc: Sing the most inspiring ballads, chronicling the greatest battles!

18000.name: City Siege IV
18000.desc: Defeat rival alliances, seize key strongholds worldwide, gain stronghold bonuses, and dominate the server.

28000.name: Kingdom War
28000.desc: The Royal City Scramble is settled. Kingdom War is about to begin. All Doctors, unite and resist the invaders

16000.name: Elixir Scramble
16000.desc: The rare elixir is the most valuable resource during the plague era. Defeat opponents, claim victory, and save humanity.

31000.name: Cheese Trap Upgrade
31000.desc: Your power has surged, raising the Cheese Thief difficulty cap to Lv.6! Higher difficulty yields more rewards.

21000.name: Death Performer
21000.desc: Amidst dazzling tricks, exudes endless killing intent.

41000.name: Cheese Trap Upgrade
41000.desc: Your power increased, the Cheese Thief difficulty cap is raised to Lv.9! Higher difficulty yields more rewards.

25000.name: City Siege VI
25000.desc: Defeat rival alliances, seize key strongholds worldwide, gain stronghold bonuses, and dominate the server.

15000.name: City Siege III
15000.desc: Defeat rival alliances, seize key strongholds worldwide, gain stronghold bonuses, and dominate the server.

23000.name: City Siege V
23000.desc: Defeat rival alliances, seize key strongholds worldwide, gain stronghold bonuses, and dominate the server.

13000.name: Shadow Plunderer
13000.desc: A commanding UR Hero with overwhelming output, intimidating all foes!

43000.name: Cheese Trap Upgrade
43000.desc: Your power increased, the Cheese Thief difficulty cap is raised to Lv.10! Higher difficulty yields more rewards.

42000.name: Queen of Fire
42000.desc: Create all, or destroy all. The choice is yours!

19000.name: Cheese Trap Upgrade
19000.desc: Your power has surged, raising the Cheese Thief difficulty cap to Lv.4! Higher difficulty yields more rewards.

38000.name: Healing Starbell
38000.desc: With the chime of a clear bell, all wounds are healed.

11000.name: Cheese Trap Upgrade
11000.desc: Your power has surged, raising the Cheese Thief difficulty cap to Lv.3! Higher difficulty yields more rewards.

37000.name: Unleashed Power
37000.desc: Unleashed from its bonds, this power is capable of destroying all.

1000.name: Crimson Blade
1000.desc: Powerful UR Hero with immense damage, the ultimate evil vanquisher! Make her your strongest weapon!

36000.name: Cheese Trap Upgrade
36000.desc: Your power increased, the Cheese Thief difficulty cap is raised to Lv.8! Higher difficulty yields more rewards.

3000.name: Covert Operation
3000.desc: Many secret treasures lie hidden in this world full of dangers. Dispatch Heroes to retrieve them to your territory before others discover them!

2000.name: Unbreakable Shield
2000.desc: Powerful UR Hero with immense defense, capable of withstanding any attack! Head to the Tavern to recruit!

5000.name: Survival Battle
5000.desc: To survive, you must be fully prepared!

4000.name: Rally Battle
4000.desc: Rally alliance members to defeat the world's powerful Blight with utmost strength!

7000.name: Cheese Trap
7000.desc: Nefarious thieves frequently invade. Set traps to capture them!

6000.name: Demon King Blight
6000.desc: The Demon King Blight has emerged. Gather everyone to eliminate them before disaster strikes!

9000.name: City Siege
9000.desc: Defeat rival alliances, seize key strongholds worldwide, gain stronghold bonuses, and dominate the server.

8000.name: Intercity Trade
8000.desc: Escort the caravan between towns to earn generous rewards!

35000.name: Mountain Spirit
35000.desc: Harness the mystic power of nature to effortlessly overcome any threat.

34000.name: Cheese Trap Upgrade
34000.desc: Your power has surged, raising the Cheese Thief difficulty cap to Lv.7! Higher difficulty yields more rewards.

33000.name: Fang of Fate
33000.desc: A tank-type hero by nature, whose wolf lineage grants an extraordinary resistance to pain.

32000.name: Crimson Rose
32000.desc: A born hunter who makes enemy wither away like falling petals.

27000.name: Royal City Scramble
27000.desc: The struggle for the stronghold is at a critical point. Advance towards the Royal City and prove your alliance's strength!

29000.name: Battlefield Hunter
29000.desc: An extremely reliable and tough guardian who blocks all enemy attacks. Recruit him now.

20000.name: Sweetheart Red Riding Hood
20000.desc: Beneath the sweet appearance lies incredible power!

30000.name: Cross-Server Intercity Trade
30000.desc: Thanks to the Doctors' efforts, we've opened trade routes with other regions. Escort the goods and earn rewards!

40000.name: Puppet
40000.desc: It never lies, it never betrays, it only clear the obstacles in your path.

17000.name: Alliance Duel
17000.desc: Intense confrontations between alliances. Each member completes quests, earns points, defeats opponents, and receives generous rewards!

14000.name: Unyielding Moon
14000.desc: A UR Hero who guards all like the bright moon. Feel her pure power!

24000.name: Cheese Trap Upgrade
24000.desc: Your power has surged, raising the Cheese Thief difficulty cap to Lv.5! Higher difficulty yields more rewards.

12000.name: City Siege II
12000.desc: Defeat rival alliances, seize the city, and gain stronghold bonuses! Become the King of Battle!

22000.name: Hunt Battle
22000.desc: The hordes are ravaging the land. Wipe them out!

2001.textButtonUp: Rat Horde repelled. Claim your reward!

1001.textButtonUp: Flame of Hope ignited. Claim your reward!
